# Memory Health Check Template

Run this monthly and before release sign-off.

## Context
- Date: `<YYYY-MM-DD>`
- Reviewer: `<name-or-team>`
- Scope: `<global / workspace / both>`

## Checklist
- [ ] All `critical` entries reviewed for accuracy.
- [ ] Stale paths/commands/versions updated.
- [ ] Duplicate entries merged or removed.
- [ ] Old low-value notes moved to `archive`.
- [ ] No sensitive data detected in memory content.
- [ ] Recent major decisions are captured.

## Summary Metrics
- Critical checked: `<count>`
- Stale fixed: `<count>`
- Archived: `<count>`
- Removed: `<count>`
- New entries added: `<count>`

## Result
- Status: `PASS | FAIL`
- Notes:
  - `<short note 1>`
  - `<short note 2>`

## Follow-up Actions
1. `<action>`
2. `<action>`
